zh.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge是Bridge的兒子，於1601年出生在英國英格蘭艾可。他於大約1636年與Mary結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年12月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年82歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓韋斯特 洛波利艾布拉姆森 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge是Bridge的儿子，于1601年出生在英国英格兰艾可。他于大约1636年与Mary结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1683年12月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年82岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓韋斯特 洛波利艾布拉姆森 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Bridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English brigge ‘bridge’, Old English brycg, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, a metonymic occupational name for a bridge keeper, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this element, as for example Bridge in Kent or Bridge Sollers in Herefordshire. Building and maintaining bridges was one of the three main feudal obligations, along with bearing arms and maintaining fortifications. The cost of building a bridge was often defrayed by charging a toll, the surname thus being acquired by the toll gatherer.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Bridger
meanings: English: from an agent derivative of Middle English brigge, brugge ‘bridge’ (Old English brycg), denoting either someone who lived near a bridge or the keeper of a bridge. See Bridge .
Americanized form of German Brücker (see Brucker ).

variants.name: Burge
meanings: English: variant of Bridge , Old English brycg, with metathesis of u and r, as exemplified in several placenames of this origin in various parts of southern England.
Swiss German and German (Bürge): from Middle High German bürge ‘bailsman, guarantor’. Compare Buerge .

variants.name: Bridgeman
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English brigge, brugge ‘bridge’ (Old English brycg) + man, denoting either a dweller by or a keeper of a bridge. See Bridge .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German Bruckmann (see Bruckman ).
History: James Bridgeman or Bridgman (1620–76) came to Hartford, CT, from Winchester, Hampshire, England, in 1640.

variants.name: Brugman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Erna, Kurt.
Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge or a metonymic occupational name for a bridge keeper, from Dutch brug ‘bridge’ (see Bridge ). Compare Bruggeman .
Americanized form of Swiss German Bruggmann ‘bridge keeper’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eideard
meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Edward .

en.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge was born in 1601, in Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Bridge. He married Mary about 1636. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 December 1683, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Abramson Cemetery, West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge è nato il nel 1601 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Bridge. Lui sposato Mary circa 1636. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 dicembre 1683, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Abramson Cemetery, West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bridgeは1601年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでBridgeの息子として生まれた。約1636年にMaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1683年12月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで82歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンウエスト ロクスブリーアブラムソン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge(은)는 1601년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Bridge의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1636년 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 12월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 웨스트 록스버이 아브램슨 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge nasceu em 1601, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Bridge. Ele casou-se com Mary aproximadamente 1636. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1683, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Abramson Cemetery, West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge родился в 1601 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Bridge. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary около 1636 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 декабря 1683 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности абрамсон кеметири, вест роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Bridge nació en 1601, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Bridge. Se casó con Mary aproximadamente 1636. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1683, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Abramson Cemetery, West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
